str.notes: Suspicious Transaction Reports must be filed within 7 working days of forming suspicion. VDA (Virtual Digital Asset) service providers registered with FIU-IND are reporting entities under PMLA (Prevention of Money Laundering Act, 2002). Filed via FINnet 2.0 portal.

ctr.notes: Cash Transaction Reports required for transactions of INR 10,00,000 (10 lakh) or more. Transactions aggregating INR 10,00,000 or more in a month also reportable. Filed within 15 days of close of month.
